title: acrostichum zollingeri
intro: Acrostichum zollingeri, also known as the Zollinger's leather fern, is a species of fern native to Southeast Asia. It is a plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Acrostichum zollingeri include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
